MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT /Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT WEST, INC.'s Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Plaintiff's Application for Right To Attach Order, Order for Issuance of Writ of Possession and/or Temporary Protective Order is granted.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: John M. True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMT)
